metadata.title: Indian Geography - Transport - Roads, Railways, Ports, Shipping, Air & Inland Water Transport

questions.question: Which of the following is a correct sequence of sea ports of India from "South to North"?
questions.explanation: Correct sequence will be Thiruvananthapuram - Cochin - Calicut - Mangalore

questions.question: Which is the longest National Highway in India?
questions.explanation: NH-44 is the longest highway in India. It starts from Srinagar (J&K) and ends at Kanyakumari (Tamilnadu). Total length of this highway is 3,745km.

questions.question: Which port is known as Queen of Arabian Sea?
questions.explanation: Kochi Port is a natural Harbour, situated at the head of Vembanad Kayal, popularly known as the “Queen of the Arabian Sea”

questions.question: Which among the following highway connects Sikkim with rest of India?
questions.explanation: National Highway 10 (old name NH 31A) connects the Indo-Bangladesh border via Siliguri to Gangtok. It passes through West Bengal and Sikkim.

questions.question: In how many zones Indian Railway has been divided?
questions.explanation: There are total 18 zones in Indian Railways.
